name: Kanyashree Prakalpa
eligibility: Unmarried girls, Age 13-18, West Bengal resident.
benefit: Annual scholarship of ₹1,000 and one-time grant of ₹25,000.

name: Swami Vivekananda Merit-cum-Means Scholarship (SVMCM)
eligibility: Resident of WB, Studying in Class 11 or higher, 60% marks.
benefit: ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 per month depending on the course.
